docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER JORGE BARAJAS PETITION FOR LEAVE TO PROCEED WITHOUT CLAIM AGAINST THE SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT IS GRANTED. THE REPLY DECLARATION PROVIDES THE FACTUAL BASIS FOR THE RELIEF REQUESTED. DEFENDANT'S DEFENSE AS TO THE SUFFICIENCY OF THE CLAIM WAS WAIVED FOR FAILURE TO GIVE NOTICE UNDER GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 910.8. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) JUDGE: PATRICK J. Notice Of Petition For Leave To Proceed Without Claim Against The San Francisco Unified School District
Off Calendar Sep-02-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER JORGE BARAJAS Petition For Leave To Proceed Without Claim Against The San Francisco Unified School District.
RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - GRANTED. THE REPLY DECLARATION PROVIDES THE FACTUAL BASIS FOR THE RELIEF REQUESTED. DEFENDANT'S DEFENSE AS TO THE SUFFICIENCY OF THE CLAIM WAS WAIVED FOR FAILURE TO GIVE NOTICE UNDER GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 910.8. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) (302/PJM/VC) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
